decision.summary: No new action: with only 2 hours left to daily expiry, there is no credible same-day edge left and the weekly 80k reach remains the only valid live thesis expression.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77904.46, but only 2 hours remain until daily expiry, so the daily board is effectively unusable for fresh entries. The nearest upside daily, 79k reach, is only about 15.5%, and the nearest downside dailies are all far below the preferred range, so there is no same-day setup worth forcing. The account now only has the active weekly 80k reach around 43.5%, while the old weekly 72k dip remains a discarded legacy position. The weekly 80k reach is still alive enough to keep, but not near the 90-95% take-profit zone and not weak enough to require forced management. The next weekly upside strike, 82k reach, is only about 12%, too weak to justify opening a secondary weekly slot. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k reach and avoid opening anything new into a nearly finished daily session.
